title: teucrium oxylepis subsp. rhiphaeum
intro: Teucrium oxylepis subsp. rhiphaeum, also known as Rhiphaeum, is a subspecies of the Teucrium oxylepis plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Rhiphaeum include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, treat digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rhiphaeum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
